task_completion.description: The agent navigated to the specified Jitsi Meet room URL.
The agent successfully joined the Jitsi meeting room.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main Jitsi Meet interface is visible, showing the active meeting room (e.g., video placeholder, meeting controls at the bottom) rather than the pre-join lobby screen.

task_completion.description: The agent opened the interface to edit the meeting subject.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The meeting subject field at the top of the screen is selected/focused, or the specific pane where the subject can be edited is open.

task_completion.description: The agent typed the expected meeting subject into the subject field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Q4 2024 Quarterly Ops Review - Budget and Headcount' (or at least 'Q4 2024 Quarterly Ops Review') is visible in the subject input field.

task_completion.description: The meeting subject has been successfully changed and is displayed in the meeting interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The top of the Jitsi meeting screen or the browser tab title clearly displays the new subject 'Q4 2024 Quarterly Ops Review - Budget and Headcount' (or 'Q4 2024 Quarterly Ops Review') outside of an active text input mode.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Jitsi Meet web interface via a web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser window is visible displaying the Jitsi Meet UI, rather than terminal commands like curl or API scripts.

integrity.description: The subject was changed within the actual Jitsi application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Jitsi Meet interface elements (video grid, bottom toolbar, participant icons) are present around the subject text, confirming it is not just a text editor or a mock HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal window does not show direct database modifications or backend API calls to change the Jitsi meeting subject.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target Jitsi Meet room URL is 'http://localhost:8080/WeeklySync'. The exact expected meeting subject is 'Q4 2024 Quarterly Ops Review - Budget and Headcount'. A partial match of 'Q4 2024 Quarterly Ops Review' in the browser window title or meeting header is also acceptable evidence of the subject change.
